title: [New App] Google Sheets Full Integration: Sync, Automate, and Save Time! 🚀

posts.author: LupApps (Idan Lupo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday community!

We’re excited to introduce our new app—Google Sheets Full Integration for monday.com! If you’ve been looking for a seamless way to connect your monday workflows with Google Sheets, this app is made for you!

With this integration, you can:

• Sync board data with Google Sheets in real-time. Export columns, rows, and even individual cells with custom automations.

• Automate your workflows with tailored triggers and actions, keeping your data flowing effortlessly between platforms.

• Instantly export data with one click or automate it to fit your needs. No more double-entry!

• Upcoming two-way sync to ensure your monday boards and Google Sheets are always up to date.

Whether you’re using monday for project management or data analysis, this integration allows you to streamline your processes and focus on what matters most.

Check out Google Sheets Full Integration.

We’re here to make your life smooth and easy. Need a feature we don’t have yet? We can implement new features within 24 hours—but we need to know what you want! Feel free to schedule a 1:1 quick call with us to discuss your dream features and how we can help make them a reality.

Book a quick call with us here!
